title: Memphis Design & Code: Intro to Game Design

location.name: Crews Center for Entrepreneurship, 2nd Floor - University of Memphis

summary: Join us at the Crews Center as we host Naim Hakeem for a deep dive into the intersection of art and technology. Naim will share his journey as a digital artist and technologist, exploring how he leverages technology to create immersive art experiences. Attendees will gain insights into the creative process, the tools and technologies used, and how to navigate the evolving landscape of digital art.

description.whoIsThisFor: UI/UX designers, software engineers, or aspiring developers who want to level up their web game and understand performance-focused development.

agenda.details: Grab some food and meet new faces.
Nadia Zirak will show us how the new RSO Tiger Web Lab plans to help organizations build their first web applications and web pages.
A space to share projects, ask follow-up questions, and connect with the community.

rsvp.details: Please confirm your attendance via this Meetup page so we can get an accurate headcount for food.

stayConnected: Learn more about Design and Code at our website - www.memphisdesignandcode.com

U of M students, see what else the Crews Center has to offer - www.memphis.edu/crews/
